name: Irish Log
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix together sifted cake flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
3. In another bowl, whisk eggs until frothy.
4. Gradually add sugar and cold water to the egg mixture, stirring continuously.
5. Stir in unsweetened chocolate until well combined.
6. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, mixing until just combined.
7. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish or cake pan.
8. Sprinkle confectioners sugar over the top of the batter.
9. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Allow the log to cool completely before slicing and serving.
